description: You are a freelance beat maker preparing a sample pack of piano loops for a marketplace submission. Using the source audio at /home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav and the specifications in /home/ga/Audio/marketplace_brief/submission_spec.txt, configure the Ardour session 'MyProject' with a tempo of 90 BPM and a track named 'Piano Loops' at -6 dB gain. The session must contain at least 3 audio regions and 3 range markers with 'Loop' in their names. Export at least 2 WAV files and the pack_info.txt metadata file to /home/ga/Audio/loop_pack_delivery/.
